demo.title: Stamp a V4 burn reactor for any Robinhood Chain token from an X post
demo.code:
@bankrbot make a burn reactor for $SHILLTOKEN on robinhood

-> 1. reactorOf(token) — already exists? reply with it, done
   2. createReactor(token) on the LIVE factory 0xdC36A42c…3C80 (~3.5M gas)
   3. acceptAdmin() on the new reactor
   4. Reply with the reactor address + Blockscout link
   Registry is one-per-token forever; factory holds no funds.

setup: Requires the Bankr skill with an API key configured and wallet funded with a little ETH on Robinhood Chain (chain 4663)
The factory is ALREADY DEPLOYED at 0xdC36A42cf7F964053EB3Ab2aF169BdaBF4263C80 (source-verified) — never deploy it
Always check reactorOf(token) before createReactor — the registry is one-per-token forever
After createReactor, call acceptAdmin() on the returned reactor address
